text: Jackson Ramos rose to Jackson Ramos's feet, joining the standing ovation, Jackson Ramos's hands stinging from the force of Jackson Ramos's clapping. As the actors took their bows, Jackson Ramos felt a bittersweet mixture of catharsis and melancholy. The tragedy had touched something deep within Jackson Ramos, leaving an indelible mark on Jackson Ramos's soul.
